title: ixora longituba var. sumatrana
intro: Ixora longituba var. sumatrana, also known as Sumatran ixora, is a variety of flowering plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the Sumatran ixora is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
